title: Songwriter Notebook progression feel
description: A chord-progression template. Exactly one of: DIATONIC `degrees` (scale-degree indices voiced in the app's major/minor mode); CHROMATIC `progression` (Roman-numeral tokens, absolute relative to the tonic, non-diatonic allowed); or SECTIONED `sections` (labeled chromatic blocks such as Main and Bridge).

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema (for editor validation), e.g. "./feel.schema.json".

id.description: Unique slug. Lowercase letters, digits and hyphens; this is also the deep-link value (?feel=<id>) and the file name feels/<id>.json.

name.description: Display name shown in the picker.

degrees.description: DIATONIC feel: scale-degree indices (0 = I, 1 = ii, ... 6 = vii) voiced in the app's current major/minor mode. Repeats are allowed and significant.

progression.description: CHROMATIC feel: Roman-numeral chord tokens relative to the tonic (e.g. "I","bVII","bVI","v","II7","#iv","I5"). Numeral case = base quality (UPPER major, lower minor); b/# alters the root chromatically; optional suffix sets chord type (5 power, o/dim diminished, +/aug augmented, 7, maj7, m7, sus2, sus4). Mode-independent and free to be non-diatonic. Repeats are allowed and significant.

label.description: Section name shown as a heading, e.g. "Main", "Bridge".

sections.description: SECTIONED feel: ordered labeled blocks, each its own chromatic token progression (e.g. a Main section and a Bridge). Mode-independent, like a chromatic feel.

description.description: Optional human note about the feel.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version this file targets. 1 = diatonic (degrees); 2 = chromatic (progression tokens); 3 = sectioned (labeled chromatic blocks).
